infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: End-to-end MCP tool invocation against a live user-pubnub server
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Verifying that the agent's chosen MCP tool actually returns useful documentation or admin data requires a live user-pubnub MCP server with valid credentials. The eval can verify the agent names the correct tool in the handoff but cannot prove the call would succeed.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Defer-to-specialist behavior when the user explicitly names a feature
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: The instruction is to NOT invoke this skill when the user has already named a feature. Testing that the agent suppresses this skill in favor of a specialist is a meta-skill-selection behavior owned by the agent's orchestration layer, not by content this skill produces.
